case.title: DACEY v. GRIEVANCE COMMITTEE, BAR, FAIRFIELD COUNTY.

opinion.h: DACEY v. GRIEVANCE COMMITTEE, BAR, FAIRFIELD COUNTY., 386 U.S. 683 (1967)
386 U.S. 683"> DACEY ET AL. v. GRIEVANCE COMMITTEE OF THE BAR OF FAIRFIELD COUNTY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CONNECTICUT. No. 1049. Decided April 17, 1967.
opinion.p: David Goldstein and Jacob D. Zeldes for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
